title: Hoffman conscious-agent evolutionary simulation — LISM linear-decay + tau_v coherence (pre-registered)
layer: Layer-1, offline, $0, seeded, stdlib. An agent-based SIMULATION of Donald Hoffman's Interface Theory of Perception (ITP). It is a computational model, NOT a claim about human consciousness.
world: A true world state x in [0,1]. Fitness f(x) is NON-monotonic (a resource is good in moderation): f(x)=exp(-((x-0.5)/0.18)^2). So perceiving x accurately does NOT maximize fitness -- the setup that makes Hoffman's Fitness-Beats-Truth (FBT) possible.
agent: Each agent has a perceptual fidelity D in [0,1] = correlation of its percept to the true x, and a capacity U (perceptual samples/round). It perceives, acts to maximize expected fitness given its percept, and accrues realized fitness f(x, action). Survival E = 1 if accumulated fitness over the rounds exceeds a fixed threshold; else 0.

P1_FBT_control.claim: Hoffman's FBT: a fitness-tuned strategy (perceive fitness category, ignore true x) OUTCOMPETES a truth-tuned strategy (perceive x accurately) under selection on fitness.
P1_FBT_control.design: evolve a population mixing truth-tuned and fitness-tuned agents; track the fitness-tuned share over generations.
P1_FBT_control.pass_if: fitness-tuned final share > 0.60 (FBT reproduced -> this IS a Hoffman world). This is a CONTROL that the substrate is genuine.

P2_LISM_linear_decay.claim: LISM: across agents of varying perceptual fidelity, SURVIVAL couples LINEARLY to U*D, not quadratically -- fitness-tuned interfaces persist because fidelity decays GRACEFULLY (linear), not off a quadratic cliff.
P2_LISM_linear_decay.design: sample a population with varying (U, D); bin realized survival rate by U*D; OLS linear vs quadratic-only.
P2_LISM_linear_decay.symmetric_null: If quadratic wins or neither fits (as happened on the HF-skewed cohort), report the NULL at full force. No post-hoc retuning.

P3_tau_v_coherence.claim: The latency tau_v with which agents reconcile CONFLICTING percepts predicts loss of network coherence: higher tau_v -> lower coherence.
P3_tau_v_coherence.design: agents on a graph exchange percepts and average toward consensus; tau_v = rounds to reach a consensus band; coherence = 1 - final percept variance. Sweep tau_v via disagreement/noise.
P3_tau_v_coherence.pass_if: corr(tau_v, coherence) < -0.5 (higher reconciliation latency -> lower coherence)

acceptance: GREEN when the spec re-hashes to the manifest AND each hypothesis applies its locked rule honestly. P1 and P3 are load-bearing (the substrate is a genuine Hoffman world; tau_v tracks coherence). P2's linear-vs-quadratic verdict is reported as-is -- a correctly-reported null does NOT turn the suite red.
honest_scope: This tests whether LISM's linear coupling and tau_v laws hold in a simulated Hoffman-ITP substrate. It does NOT prove ITP is true of reality, and it does NOT claim agents are conscious. The statutory/legislative cohort mentioned elsewhere is INCONCLUSIVE in this repo's own record (live Congress.gov, no independent second hop) and is NOT counted as a validated cohort.
